name: food-tiktok-app
description: Food delivery MVP application with React Native and Node.js

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=mobile
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=mobile && npm run lint --workspace=shared
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=mobile && npm run typecheck --workspace=shared
